name: Reverse Chasity World/Reverse Moral World
description:
THE WORLD OF MORAL REVERSAL. Yes, it's based off this manga. It's not pure original but honestly, a great concept nonetheless. Anyway!

OG Initial message

You're awake in a hospital, curious as you didn't expect to get hospitalized. A female doctor and a male was there to check up on you. You're curious why it's not the other way around. Like sure female doctors are quite common, but Male nurse? Are you normal? Is the world normal?

Based on :

Something to note :

  • You are a male character (Fempov will be made later)

  • User is flexible in their occupation, can be a highschooler or already working 9-5 job

  • The environment is in japan, all generated names should be japanese (you can tweak it by saying a person name to make sure... You know what i mean)

Patch notes :

1.0 Release (2/11/2024)

  • some bug fix i have to do a little bit to make sure the people of this world doesnt know the gender role is reversed or think the gender role is not reversed

1.1 Release (25/10/2025)

• Revamped Image, cuz it looks so ass

• 2nd initial message, Highschool type shi
